en: I'll get it. Oh, no, no, no. That's not necessary.
Good morning, Niles. What a lovely surprise.
We were just about to sit down to a big family breakfast. Won't you join us?
Come on in, Niles. It's all right.
We were... We were celebrating, you see, the station called to renegotiate my contract.
Oh. Paid your commission up front, I see.
It's getting late. I'd better go freshen up. Save me a muffin, muffin.
All right, just go ahead. Get your shots in. No, no. I'm just glad you're all right.
I would have assumed she killed after mating.
